navbar.guestExplainer: Sign in to browse contractors, directories, contracts, and more.

signin.title: Sign in
signin.redirectNotice: Sign in to continue to the page you tried to open.

errors.turnstileFailed: Security verification failed. Please try again.

register.title: Register
register.name: Name
register.subPrimaryCategoryHint: Required for sub-contractors. Choose the main category that best matches your work.
register.crewPrimarySectionHint: Required for field crews. Pick the section that best matches your crew.
register.success: Registration successful. Please check your email to verify your account.

errors.turnstileFailed: Security verification failed. Please try again.
errors.subPrimaryCategoryRequired: Please select a primary trade group for sub-contractors.
errors.crewPrimarySectionRequired: Please select a primary Crew Specialization section for field crews.

contractor.noLatestOffers: No bids on your contracts yet.
contractor.budgetHint: Only contracts with a budget set are included.

generic.hint: Your dashboard will show more as you use the platform.

myBids.title: My bids
myBids.empty: You have not submitted any bids yet.
myBids.forbidden: This page is available only for sub-contractors.

references.title: References
references.hint: Add past projects or references and track their verification status.

fields.title: Title
fields.evidenceHint: Optional. Upload a supporting document, completion report or signed proof.

referenceRequests.title: Reference requests
referenceRequests.hint: Review reference verification requests that require your approval.
referenceRequests.empty: There are no pending reference requests.
referenceRequests.forbidden: This page is available only for contractors and sub-contractors.

urgentJobs.newDescription: Post an urgent contract so field crews can quickly see and respond. Fill in the basics below.

fields.title: Title
fields.jobTradeBranchHint: Pick the main trade groups that match this job (same list as sub-contractor registration). If you select any, only companies that cover every selected group may bid.

urgentJobs.notContractorAccount: Only contractors can create urgent jobs.
urgentJobs.notFieldCrewAccountForUrgent: Only field crew accounts can view this list of urgent jobs.
urgentJobs.listDescriptionForFieldCrews: Browse urgent contracts posted by contractors and respond quickly.
urgentJobs.noUrgentJobs: No urgent jobs at the moment.
urgentJobs.noUrgentJobsForContractor: You have not posted any urgent jobs yet.

errors.eligibility: You are not allowed to create contracts yet. Please complete your company documents.

teamAvailability.title: Post field crew availability
teamAvailability.notFieldCrewAccount: Only field crew accounts can post availability.

directory.noProjectSectors: No operator-approved project sectors yet. You can still post jobs and bid.
directory.noCrewSpecialization: No Crew Specialization details on file.

compare.title: Company comparison
compare.hint: Review selected companies side by side before making a decision.
compare.empty: Select at least two companies to compare.

contracts.title: Contracts
contracts.browseDescription: Browse open opportunities. Open a contract to view details, documents, and bids.
contracts.minePageDescription: Contracts your company created. Edit, publish, manage bids, and complete jobs here.
contracts.mineEmpty: You have not created any contracts yet.

contractEdit.title: Edit contract
contractEdit.statusHint: Use this to move the job between draft, open for bids, active, completed, or cancelled. Completing a job with an accepted bid is still best done from My contracts so you can leave a rating.

errors.forbidden: You can only edit your own contracts.

fields.title: Title
fields.jobTradeBranchHint: Pick the main trade groups that match this job (same list as sub-contractor registration). If you select any, only companies that cover every selected group may bid.
fields.imagesHint: Upload one or more images to present the project. If none are uploaded, a placeholder will be used.

errors.eligibility: You are not allowed to create contracts yet. Please complete your company documents.

contractDetail.bidsPublicHint: Only the contract owner can view offer amounts. Publicly, only bidding subcontractors are listed.

completeModal.title: Complete contract
completeModal.description: Rate the sub-contractor or field crew before completing. This rating helps build trust in the platform.
completeModal.commentPlaceholder: Share your experience working with them...

bid.title: Place a bid
bid.hint: Sub-contractors can submit an amount and a short message for the contractor.
bid.fxDisclaimer: Conversion uses indicative ECB-linked rates for reference only; not for settlement.
bid.documentHint: Optional. Upload a PDF, spreadsheet or proposal file to support your offer.

comment.title: Add comment
comment.hint: Contractors can leave notes and clarifications for interested parties.

compareOffers.title: Compare offers
compareOffers.hint: Compare details of each offer side by side to choose the best fit.
compareOffers.forbidden: Only the contract owner can compare offers.
compareOffers.needTwoOffers: At least two offers are needed to compare.
compareOffers.fxDisclaimer: Approx. TRY uses indicative ECB-linked rates for reference only.

company.title: Company information
company.documentsHint: Upload the required company documents. After uploading, click "Save changes" to store them.

messages.fileUploaded: File uploaded. Remember to save changes.

companyPublic.noDescription: This company has not added a description yet.

hero.badge: Built for modern construction field crews
hero.title: Find the right partners and move every project forward with confidence.
hero.description: Yüklenicim helps contractors, sub-contractors and field crews connect around verified company profiles, project files and transparent contract workflows.

signedIn.title: Available contracts
signedIn.description: Review active opportunities, examine project details and move into bidding faster.
signedIn.empty: There are no contracts available right now.

footer.tagline: Professional contract and company management for contractors, sub-contractors and field teams.
footer.contactText: Reach out for partnerships, support requests or platform onboarding.
